title: Eva Underpants
wikitext:
[]: Eva Underpants             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Jul 28, 2013 5:58 pm [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/interest/2013-07-28/evangelion-ladies-frilly-laced-underpants-for-sale[/url] Because when you go down on your girl & unzip her pants, the first thing you want to be able to do is stare Kaworu right in the eyes!

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Sun Jul 28, 2013 8:53 pm That's it, shut down the forum. We can't top this. I must have Rei covering my junk. It's imperative.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Jul 28, 2013 8:57 pm Anno can be a terrifying force when drunk.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Jul 28, 2013 9:03 pm Catamari wrote: I must have Rei covering my junk. It's imperative.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Sun Jul 28, 2013 9:07 pm You know, somehow Rei and Kaworu feel like fitting subjects for underwear/lingerie. Not sure why.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Jul 28, 2013 9:07 pm All of the images are on the butt side. This isn't supposed to get your junk closer to your 2D waifu/hasbando. It's meant to use your ass as a billboard.

[]:             Quote Post by CatGirl » Sun Jul 28, 2013 10:42 pm I WANT ALL OF THEM REALLY BADLY (especially the Kaworu one). I might actually purchase a pair or two because they're insanely cheap compared to the previous ones that have been released

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Jul 28, 2013 11:35 pm You can try contacting this user to see if she can help you get them from Japan. $89 for a pair of drawers, there's no words for it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Jul 29, 2013 1:36 am They've done this before: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/03/evangelion-underwear-for-sale-in-japan/

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Mon Jul 29, 2013 4:27 am Well, you won't penetrate any AT field with this, thats for sure.

[]:             Quote Post by CatGirl » Mon Jul 29, 2013 6:52 am AR-99 wrote: You can try contacting this user to see if she can help you get them from Japan. $89 for a pair of drawers, there's no words for it.

[]:             Quote Post by Veefy » Mon Jul 29, 2013 6:55 am More like wunder pants. Am I rite?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 29, 2013 9:10 am As usual, Shinji is left out. Seriously, what merchandise will they come up with next?

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Mon Jul 29, 2013 9:32 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Seriously, what merchandise will they come up with next?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Jul 29, 2013 11:02 am ^ It would be all over with sex toys. Despite all the pantsu releases there are no bras yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jul 29, 2013 11:46 am Catamari wrote: When we get Evangelion-themed rubbers, then the industry will have truly jumped the shark.

[]:             Quote Post by Catamari » Mon Jul 29, 2013 12:10 pm Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: Are you kidding me, man? The Entry Plug rubbers would be a massive hit, I'm sure.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jul 29, 2013 1:03 pm *Douses himself in gasoline and sets himself on fire*

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Jul 29, 2013 1:39 pm Fodder for impact jokes, yeah.

[]:             Quote Post by Squigsquasher » Mon Jul 29, 2013 5:06 pm Shinji is either disappointed or relieved to know that his image will not be adorning people's buttocks.
